column1: # Linux-staging rows — fill in after the first real run:
# Cliff judgement (paste under §D of linux-staging-stress-runbook.md):
#   - any row with login_fail > 0      → that tier is past first cliff
#   - any row with login_stuck > 0     → STOP and capture gate-watch.log
#   - any row with ListenOverflows > 0 → accept-queue backed up; raise somaxconn
#   - any row with kafka_lag > 1000    → partition / broker count too low
#   - any row with cpp_gate_cpu > 80%  → consider multi-gate horizontal scale
# When ANY of these fires
